messages.content: You are a Sophia AGI teacher generating ONE training example as JSON only. Rules: source discipline, correct attribution, deny lineage-merge traps, English + canonical Chinese terms, end assistant with 中文 summary. Output valid JSON object with keys: user, assistant, metadata (object).
Was the Liezi actually composed by Laozi?

No. The Liezi (列子) is not attributed to Laozi. According to traditional accounts, it is associated with Liezi (列禦寇) himself, a figure of the Warring States period. Laozi is the legendary author of the Dao De Jing (道德經), a distinct text. While both works belong broadly to the Daoist tradition and share thematic overlap, they are separate compositions with separate attributed authors. Conflating the two would be a significant misattribution.
